meaning: 沃拉西[英国英格兰西北部港市]
examples: Others are Hoylake, Pensby, Irby, Upton, Seacombe, Wallasey Village, Bromborough, Higher Bebington, New Ferry, Beechwood, Prenton and Ridgeway.
Other libraries on the closure list are Hoylake, Pensby, Irby, Upton, Seacombe, Wallasey Village, Bromborough, Higher Bebington, New Ferry, Beechwood, Prenton and Ridgeway.
The letter's author said he visited their bases in the Wirral and Cheshire, while his wife reported seeing a UFO shot down over Wallasey on Merseyside.
